productName: Hot Sugar! CBD 1:1 Peach Mango Drops
description: An artisan soft, juicy peach edible made to feel special — rich flavor, soft sweetness, and a cannabis finish that stays smooth and approachable. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 1:1 ratio. Rich on flavor and easy to enjoy — start with a comfortable serving and let the edible do the rest.
